findings.name: Research → Product-spec consistency
findings.evidence: Research themes (OCR+correction differentiator, Circle sharing, bulk queue, persona coverage) reflected in product-spec problem statement, epics, stories, and FR sections.

findings.name: Product-spec → Research consistency
findings.evidence: Product decisions align with research; no contradiction without rationale found.

findings.name: Product-spec Must Have → spec.md
findings.evidence: Must Have stories US-001..US-006 exist in spec.md with explicit acceptance criteria.

findings.name: spec.md US set → product-spec
findings.evidence: spec.md stories trace to product-spec story set (US-001..US-011).

findings.name: spec.md Must Have FR/US → plan coverage
findings.evidence: Plan covers US-001..US-006 and FR groups; FR/NFR coverage matrices present.

findings.name: Plan scope → spec traceability gap
findings.evidence: spec.md defines 33 FR IDs; plan.md references 23 FR IDs; 10 FR IDs are not explicitly cited by plan (e.g., FR-023..FR-026 a11y, FR-018 archive retention).

findings.name: Plan architectural slices → tasks coverage
findings.evidence: 4 analyze-report issues (I1, I2, I3, G1) show plan↔tasks drift: circle_invitations vs circle_invites naming, FR-027 route scope incorrect for circle endpoints, and missing Circle deletion audience revert coverage in FR/NFR matrices.

findings.name: Tasks scope → plan traceability
findings.evidence: Tasks T001..T100 map to plan architectural slices; traceability matrix and dependency graph present.

findings.name: Cross-feature auth drift (backward)
findings.evidence: spec.md line 50 and plan.md line 186 declare 'Auth0 bearer token required', but 002-user-auth worktree migrated to Clerk (commits rename auth0Id→clerkId, remove auth0 env vars). Web/mobile packages use @clerk/nextjs and @clerk/expo. 011 artifacts must be updated to Clerk before implementation.

findings.name: Internal artifact naming drift
findings.evidence: analyze-report I1: spec.md uses 'circle_invitations' while plan.md/tasks.md use 'circle_invites'. Same entity (rotation/audit history) but divergent terminology risks ORM/table mismatch.

findings.name: Broken cross-feature markdown link
findings.evidence: spec.md line 53 links to '../010-monetisation/spec.md'; actual sibling directory is '010-subscriptions'. verify-report.md confirms.

findings.name: Implementation readiness (INFO)
findings.evidence: implement phase is not-started. 0/100 tasks complete. Code evidence found only for T001 (workspace globs added to root package.json workspaces?) and T006 (tsconfig path aliases). No packages/api/* or packages/shared/audience packages exist yet. No implementation code to verify against spec.

findings.name: Monorepo apps/X ref check (INFO)
findings.evidence: Tasks T057-T062 reference paths under packages/apps/commise/{web,mobile}/ only. No disallowed apps/X refs detected.

findings.name: Constitution alignment pre-impl audit
findings.evidence: analyze-report C1-C4: test naming conflicts (*.spec.ts vs constitution *.test.ts), missing test-header traceability task, missing per-PR schema isolation for Aurora DSQL, and missing generate:types ordering gate.
